name: Brazilian Style Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 firm ripe tomatoes, peeled and seeded (or 1 can tomatoes)
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in oil until soft.
2. Add crushed garlic and bell pepper. Cook 5 minutes over medium heat, uncovered, or until the bell pepper is soft.
3. Stir in tomatoes and anchovies. Cook until the tomatoes are almost creamy, stirring occasionally.
4. Add capers, olives, oregano, drained tuna, and cook a few minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in parsley.
5. Combine with cooked pasta and pour into an oiled baking dish.
6. Sprinkle cheese mixed with breadcrumbs evenly over the top.
7. Dot the top with pieces of butter.
8. Bake in a pre-heated 350°F oven for 30 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
